sourceTags_fil: DOH primary care at community health services
sourceTags_en: DOH primary care and community health services

concerns.summary_fil: Kung walang major danger sign, puwedeng magsimula sa public RHU o health center para sa basic checkup at tamang referral.
concerns.summary_en: If there is no major danger sign, a public RHU or health center is often a reasonable first stop for a basic checkup and referral.
askFor_fil: Basic consultation at physical exam
Temperature at blood pressure check
Assessment kung kailangan ng referral o antibiotics
TB screening kung ang ubo ay tumagal na nang 2 linggo o higit pa
askFor_en: Basic consultation and physical exam
Temperature and blood pressure check
Assessment for referral or antibiotics if appropriate
TB screening if the cough has lasted 2 weeks or longer
goodFirstStop_fil: Mild to moderate lagnat, ubo, sipon, o sore throat
Kailangang malaman kung puwedeng home care muna o kailangang i-refer
goodFirstStop_en: Mild to moderate fever, cough, colds, or sore throat
You need to know whether home care is enough or a referral is needed
goHospital_fil: Hirap huminga o humahabol ang paghinga
Chest pain, sobrang antok, o hirap gisingin
Mataas na lagnat na may panghihina o pagka-confuse
Matinding dehydration o paulit-ulit na pagsusuka
goHospital_en: Difficulty breathing or struggling to breathe
Chest pain, extreme sleepiness, or hard to wake
High fever with weakness or confusion
concerns.availabilityNote_fil: Hindi lahat ng BHS o RHU ay may onsite X-ray o lab. Minsan referral muna ang ibibigay bago ang tests.
concerns.availabilityNote_en: Not every BHS or RHU has onsite X-ray or laboratory services. Some tests may require a referral first.

concerns.summary_fil: Ang public RHU, lying-in, o health center ang karaniwang unang lugar para sa prenatal care, counseling, at delivery planning kung walang emergency.
concerns.summary_en: A public RHU, lying-in center, or health center is commonly the first place for prenatal care, counseling, and delivery planning when there is no emergency.
askFor_fil: Prenatal checkup at maternal consultation
Blood pressure, timbang, at regular pregnancy monitoring
Counseling sa nutrition, warning signs, at birth planning
Referral para sa labs, ultrasound, o mas mataas na antas ng care kung kailangan
askFor_en: Prenatal checkups and maternal consultation
Blood pressure, weight, and routine pregnancy monitoring
Counseling on nutrition, warning signs, and birth planning
Referral for laboratory tests, ultrasound, or higher-level care if needed
goodFirstStop_fil: Mild pregnancy concerns na hindi mukhang emergency
goodFirstStop_en: Mild pregnancy concerns that do not look like an emergency
goHospital_fil: Matinding pagdurugo
Seizure, sobrang sakit ng ulo, o malabong paningin habang buntis
Matinding pananakit ng tiyan o labor concern na mukhang emergency
Hirap huminga o hirap gisingin ang pasyente
goHospital_en: Seizure, severe headache, or blurred vision during pregnancy
Severe abdominal pain or labor concern that looks emergent
Difficulty breathing or hard to wake the patient
concerns.availabilityNote_fil: May prenatal services sa maraming public RHU at health center, pero puwedeng mag-iba ang available na tests o specialist referral bawat lugar.
concerns.availabilityNote_en: Many public RHUs and health centers provide prenatal services, but the exact tests and specialist referral options still vary by location.

concerns.summary_fil: Para sa routine bakuna, growth monitoring, at basic child checkup, public RHU o health center ang karaniwang unang puntahan.
concerns.summary_en: For routine vaccines, growth monitoring, and a basic child checkup, a public RHU or health center is usually the first place to go.
askFor_fil: Routine childhood immunization o catch-up vaccination
Growth monitoring at nutrition counseling
Basic child consultation kung may lagnat o mild illness
Advice kung saan magpapabakuna kung may namiss na schedule
askFor_en: Routine childhood immunization or catch-up vaccination
Growth monitoring and nutrition counseling
Basic child consultation for fever or mild illness
Advice on where to complete missed vaccine schedules
goodFirstStop_fil: Bakuna, under-immunized child, o routine child checkup
Mild fever o ubo ng bata na walang danger signs
goodFirstStop_en: Vaccines, under-immunized child, or a routine child checkup
Mild child fever or cough without danger signs
goHospital_fil: Hirap huminga
Seizure o hindi magising nang maayos
Mataas na lagnat na may matinding panghihina
Paulit-ulit na pagsusuka o matinding dehydration
concerns.availabilityNote_fil: Ang bakuna at clinic days ay puwedeng naka-schedule. Magtanong muna kung may session o stock sa napiling RHU o health center.
concerns.availabilityNote_en: Vaccines and clinic days may follow a schedule. Ask first whether the selected RHU or health center has an active session or available stock.

concerns.label_fil: May TB symptoms / matagal na ubo
concerns.summary_fil: Kung may matagal na ubo o pinaghihinalaang TB, public RHU o DOTS facility ang tamang unang lugar para sa screening at treatment pathway.
concerns.summary_en: If there is a long cough or possible TB, a public RHU or DOTS facility is the right first place for screening and the treatment pathway.
askFor_fil: TB symptom screening at consultation
Sputum collection o referral para sa TB tests
TB-DOTS enrollment o follow-up kung confirmed na
Household contact advice at referral kung kailangan
askFor_en: TB symptom screening and consultation
Sputum collection or referral for TB tests
TB-DOTS enrollment or follow-up if already confirmed
Household contact advice and referral if needed
goodFirstStop_fil: Ubo na 2 linggo o higit pa
Need malaman kung may DOTS facility o TB testing pathway sa inyong area
goodFirstStop_en: You need to know the nearest DOTS facility or TB testing pathway in your area
goHospital_fil: Matinding hirap huminga
Maraming dugo sa pag-ubo
Chest pain na malubha o hirap gisingin ang pasyente
goHospital_en: Coughing up a lot of blood
Severe chest pain or the patient is hard to wake
concerns.availabilityNote_fil: Ang DOTS services ay dapat i-confirm sa pinakamalapit na RHU o TB-DOTS facility. Hindi lahat ng BHS ay may full TB testing onsite.
concerns.availabilityNote_en: Confirm DOTS services with the nearest RHU or TB-DOTS facility. Not every BHS has full TB testing onsite.

concerns.summary_fil: Para sa public primary care follow-up, puwedeng magsimula sa RHU o health center para sa BP check, risk assessment, at advice kung kailangan ng referral.
concerns.summary_en: For public primary care follow-up, an RHU or health center can be the first stop for BP checks, risk assessment, and referral advice when needed.
askFor_fil: Blood pressure monitoring at risk assessment
Counseling para sa hypertension o diabetes follow-up
Blood sugar testing kung available o referral para dito
Basic consultation at review ng gamot kung may public primary care follow-up
askFor_en: Blood pressure monitoring and risk assessment
Counseling for hypertension or diabetes follow-up
Blood sugar testing if available, or referral for it
Basic consultation and medicine review if public primary care follow-up is available
goodFirstStop_fil: Kailangang magpa-check ng BP o mag-follow up sa blood sugar
Walang chest pain, stroke sign, o ibang major emergency
goodFirstStop_en: You need a BP check or blood sugar follow-up
There is no chest pain, stroke sign, or other major emergency
goHospital_fil: Chest pain
Panghihina o pamamanhid ng kalahati ng katawan
Confused, nahimatay, o hirap gisingin
Matinding hirap huminga
goHospital_en: Confusion, fainting, or hard to wake
concerns.availabilityNote_fil: Ang glucose testing ay hindi laging onsite sa BHS o RHU. Minsan strips, lab access, o referral ang naglilimita sa availability.
concerns.availabilityNote_en: Glucose testing is not always onsite at a BHS or RHU. Availability may depend on strips, lab access, or referral arrangements.

concerns.summary_fil: Public RHUs at health centers ang karaniwang first stop para sa family planning counseling at available methods.
concerns.summary_en: Public RHUs and health centers are commonly the first stop for family planning counseling and available methods.
askFor_fil: Family planning counseling at birth spacing advice
Available methods tulad ng pills, condoms, o injectables kung may stock at trained provider
Pregnancy test o referral kung kailangan
Counseling kung kailan kailangang i-refer sa mas mataas na care
askFor_en: Family planning counseling and birth spacing advice
Available methods such as pills, condoms, or injectables if there is stock and a trained provider
Pregnancy testing or referral if needed
Counseling on when referral to higher-level care is needed
goodFirstStop_fil: Questions tungkol sa pagpigil ng pagbubuntis o spacing
Need ng basic reproductive health counseling sa public facility
goodFirstStop_en: Questions about pregnancy prevention or spacing
You need basic reproductive health counseling at a public facility
goHospital_fil: Matinding pagdurugo
Matinding pananakit ng tiyan
Nahimatay o hirap gisingin
Posibleng pregnancy emergency
concerns.availabilityNote_fil: Nagkakaiba ang actual method stock at trained provider availability bawat RHU o health center.
concerns.availabilityNote_en: Actual method stock and trained provider availability differ from one RHU or health center to another.

concerns.label_en: Basic checkup / where to go first
concerns.summary_fil: Kung hindi pa malinaw kung saan pupunta, public RHU o health center ang puwedeng unang tanungan para sa basic consult at referral.
concerns.summary_en: If you are not yet sure where to go, a public RHU or health center can be the first place to ask for a basic consultation and referral.
askFor_fil: Basic consultation para ma-assess ang concern
Blood pressure at general screening
Referral kung kailangan ng hospital, bite center, TB, maternal care, o ibang public service
Advice kung paano magsimula sa public primary care o Konsulta
askFor_en: Basic consultation to assess the concern
Blood pressure and general screening
Referral if you need a hospital, bite center, TB service, maternal care, or another public service
Advice on how to start with public primary care or Konsulta
goodFirstStop_fil: Mild to moderate symptoms na hindi mukhang emergency
Hindi pa alam kung RHU, ospital, o ibang public clinic ang tama
goodFirstStop_en: Mild to moderate symptoms that do not look like an emergency
You are not yet sure whether RHU, hospital, or another public clinic is the right first stop
goHospital_fil: May anumang major danger sign
Hirap huminga, chest pain, seizure, severe bleeding, o nahimatay
Mukhang kailangang ma-admit agad
goHospital_en: Any major danger sign is present
Difficulty breathing, chest pain, seizure, severe bleeding, or fainting
concerns.availabilityNote_fil: Ang basic consultation sa public primary care ay puwedeng magkakaiba depende sa doctor or nurse schedule, LGU setup, at dami ng pasyente.
concerns.availabilityNote_en: Basic consultation access in public primary care may vary with doctor or nurse schedules, LGU setup, and patient volume.
